LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFT'S MOTION TO COMPEL INDEPENDENT MENTAL EXAMINATION IS GRANTED. FURTHER, DEFENDANT'S REQUEST THAT ONLY PLAINTIFF ATTEND THE EXAMINATION, WITHOUT PRESENCE OF COUNSEL, IS GRANTED. (SEE EDWARDS VS. SUP. CT. (1976) 16 CAL 3D 905, 910.) DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN GOOD CAUSE EXISTS FOR AN INDEPENDENT MENTAL EXAMINATION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF IS CLAIMING HE SUFFERS FROM PTSD AS A RESULT OF THE ACCIDENT AT ISSUE IN THIS CASE. A PSYCHOLOGICAL EXAMINATION IS NECESSARY FOR DEFENDANT'S EXPERT TO REACH AN ACCURATE UNDERSTANDING OF PLAINTIFF'S CONDITION. (SEE CCP SEC. 2032.210.). DEFENDANT'S EXPERT SHALL PREPARE THE REPORT BY JUNE 12, 2015. PARTIES HAVE A DISPUTE AS TO THE DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Vacated

Notice Of And Motion To Continue Trial
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Text Ruling

Defendant Synergy Project Management, Et Al.,S Notice Of And Motion To Compel Independent Mental Examination
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Off Calendar

Deft'S Motion To Compel Independent Mental Examination
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Bone, of Law Offices of Robert M. Bone, Tel. 707.525.8999, for plaintiffs;
Paige P. Yeh, of Law Offices of Goodman Neuman Hamilton LLP, Tel. 415.705.0160, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Synergy Project Management, Inc. and Scott Alan Jones' Motion To Compel Independent Mental Examination is granted. Further, Defendant's request that only Plaintiff attend the examination, without presence of counsel, is granted. (See Edwards vs. Sup. Ct. (1976) 16 Cal 3d 905, 910.) Defendant has shown good cause exists for an independent mental examination because Plaintiff is claiming he suffers from PTSD as a result of the accident at issue in this case. A psychological examination is necessary for Defendant's expert to reach an accurate understanding of Plaintiff's condition. (See CCP Sec. 2032.210.). Defendant's expert shall prepare the report by June 12, 2015. Parties have a dispute as to the discovery cut-off date. Parties to meet and confer as to form of order. Judge Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Continued To Jun-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-29-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
